name: Storm Sovereign
description: The supreme ruler of cosmic electromagnetic storms. Its roar triggers megavolt lightning strikes across galactic nebulae.
originLore: Born in the eye of an eternal intergalactic hyperstorm, Storm Sovereign governs the distribution of electrical charge across space.

lore.celestialConcordance: Storm Sovereign channels hypervolt lightning currents to recharge the magnetic fields of fading planets.

quantumResonators.name: Thunderbolt Apex
quantumResonators.description: Discharges a megavolt lightning bolt that ionizes space and paralyzes all targets.

quantumResonators.name: Tempest Vortex
quantumResonators.description: Creates a raging hurricane of electromagnetic plasma that deflects attacks.
